summary: P9 system management UI has implemented real members, departments, system roles and dictionaries pages with clean build and UI smoke screenshots. Full P9 acceptance is still blocked by TEST-007 write-operation browser E2E and REV-005 review; P10-P12 remain required before full project deployability.

issues.problem: P9 has UI smoke screenshots and clean build, but full browser write-operation E2E is not complete.
issues.requiredAction: Run browser flow for login, SYS-001 enter system, member, department, role and dictionary write operations, then update TEST-007 evidence.

issues.problem: REV-005 final P9 review cannot pass before TEST-007 full E2E completes.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
npm ci reports 2 moderate audit items. No npm audit fix --force was applied because it may force dependency upgrades; schedule dependency governance after trial deployment.
OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, OpenAPI idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended before production launch.
PM has retracted fullProjectDeployable and keeps fullProjectDeployable=false until P9-P12 pass.
